title: Template Scenario
setting: Describe the world, genre, and immediate premise.
tone: Describe expected play style and emotional texture.
rules: Add scenario-specific guidance for the GM model.

locations.name: Starting Location
locations.description: What the player can immediately perceive here.

factions.name: Main Faction
factions.description: What this faction is and how it appears to outsiders.

faction_identity.public_goal: What the faction says it wants.
faction_identity.hidden_goal: What the faction secretly wants, or null if none.

npcs.name: Main NPC
npcs.description: Observable description and role in the opening scene.

role_identity.motivation: what they are trying to accomplish
role_identity.fear: what they fear, or null if none
role_identity.desire: what they want, or null if none

quests.title: Opening Quest
quests.description: What the player is initially trying to resolve.

secrets.text: A GM-only fact that must not be revealed until discovered.

reveal_conditions.description: what must happen before the secret can be revealed

clocks.title: A pressure clock advances
clocks.consequence: What happens if the clock fills.
